loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output-side voltage/current; the card cannot render the requested battery health snapshot.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing SOC, DC Bus Quality, and Thermal Score proxies (energy, voltage deviation, power) — true battery health scores are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for autonomy envelope score — battery capacity and reserve margins are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for autonomy/runtime/headroom scores — this UPS meter does not measure battery capacity or runtime directly.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Battery Health (This electrical meter does not measure battery SOC, temperature, or output-side voltage/current; the card cannot render the requested battery health snapshot.).
